executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Generate and execute only the quick-search frontend test cases from testsprite_frontend_test_plan.json. Align with the current quick-search page at /quick-search, current Spanish locale labels, the dedicated login page at /login, and the current autocomplete-plus-date-picker flow. Do not invent dashboard, alerts, history, preferences, or health-check scenarios. Prefer stable selectors and assertions tied to current quick-search behavior.
